concerns.text: FR-011 requires incorporating real-student interaction data from ≥200 participants into final analysis. The idea explicitly frames this as a simulation-based study ('Simulate student responses using established cognitive models'). This adds human recruitment/data collection work not requested by the idea, representing over-reach.

User Story 7 requires integrating real-student data (≥200 participants) into final analysis. The idea's methodology sketch only mentions simulation ('Simulate student responses using established cognitive models'). This is scope expansion beyond the stated research approach.

Unresolved kickback concern: FR-010 defines calibration success as RMSE *difference* across conditions ≤0.02, while SC-007 specifies absolute RMSE ≤0.15. These are different metrics/thresholds for the same calibration step and may conflict. Align success criteria or clarify both must be satisfied.

FR-009 specifies 2,000 simulated students per condition (6,000 total). The idea does not specify sample size requirements. This is a concrete empirical value that should be deferred to implementation phase per spec template guidance.
